source: Transfermarkt public World Cup participant and player-value pages
methodology: Team totals are a verified public snapshot. Only explicitly verified player values are overridden; all other player values remain analyst estimates.

Cristian Romero.note: Right-knee problem reported after Argentina v Austria; awaiting a definitive team update.
Cristian Romero.noteZh: 对奥地利一战后出现右膝问题，等待球队进一步确认。

Raphinha.note: Right hamstring injury; unavailable for Brazil's final group match and under treatment.
Raphinha.noteZh: 右腿后肌受伤，将缺席巴西小组赛末轮，目前正在接受治疗。

Christian Pulisic.note: Returned to partial team training after a calf issue; match availability remains unconfirmed.
Christian Pulisic.noteZh: 小腿不适后已恢复部分合练，下一场能否出战尚未确认。

Eduardo Camavinga.note: Not included in the final World Cup squad.
Eduardo Camavinga.noteZh: 未进入世界杯最终名单。

Rodrygo.note: Ruled out before the tournament through injury.
Rodrygo.noteZh: 因伤在世界杯开赛前确定无缘赛事。

Cole Palmer.note: Not included in the final World Cup squad.
Cole Palmer.noteZh: 未进入世界杯最终名单。

Xavi Simons.note: Ruled out before the tournament through injury.
Xavi Simons.noteZh: 因伤在世界杯开赛前确定无缘赛事。

Kaoru Mitoma.note: Missed the final squad because of a hamstring injury.
Kaoru Mitoma.noteZh: 因腿后肌伤势未进入最终名单。

Billy Gilmour.note: Ruled out before the tournament through injury.
Billy Gilmour.noteZh: 因伤在世界杯开赛前确定无缘赛事。

Christoph Baumgartner.note: Ruled out before the tournament through injury.
Christoph Baumgartner.noteZh: 因伤在世界杯开赛前确定无缘赛事。
